overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a stone mountain path in a dark, overcast environment. The player moves steadily forward past rock formations and through sparse vegetation as light rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching large rock formation

events.description: light rain begins to fall from the overcast sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone mountain path toward a tall rock pillar on the left

entered.detail: tall stacked stone formation rising beside the path
uneven stone trail winding through the mountains
steep rocky slope with sparse vegetation
dark pine trees covering the distant mountainside
large rocks scattered along the right side of the path
brown and green grass tufts beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a mountain trail with a prominent tall rock pillar ahead on the left. The sky is dark and overcast, and light rain begins to fall around the 3-second mark as the camera advances steadily along the stone path toward the rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain path through rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding mountain path as the terrain opens up

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the mountain trail, passing the tall rock formation which falls behind and out of view. The path winds through sparse dry grass with scattered boulders moving closer on the right side, while the distant coniferous forest remains visible against the dark overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain trail that transitions from a focused approach toward a landmark to an open trek through a rugged landscape. It begins with a steady advance along a stone path under a dark, overcast sky, moving toward a prominent tall rock pillar on the left as light rain begins to fall. As the camera passes the pillar, the formation recedes from view and the path winds further into the wilderness. The scene then shifts to a stretch of sparse dry grass and scattered boulders that crowd the right side of the trail, while a distant coniferous forest remains visible against the gloomy horizon.
